docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.99 FILED BY GORELICK, ELLIOTT AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORELICK, ELLIOTT AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, LISA
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GORELICK, ELLIOTT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, LISA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
